purchase(PurchaseTicketsRequestDto, SecurityContext) - Method in class jpa.controllers.TicketController
Purchases one or more tickets for a concert.
purchaseTickets(PurchaseTicketsRequestDto, String) - Method in class jpa.services.impl.TicketServiceImpl
Executes purchaseTickets operation.
purchaseTickets(PurchaseTicketsRequestDto, String) - Method in interface jpa.services.interfaces.TicketService
Purchases one or more available tickets for a given concert.
PurchaseTicketsRequestDto - Record Class in jpa.dto.ticket
Payload used by a customer to buy tickets for a concert.

Creates an instance of a PurchaseTicketsRequestDto record class.
